Name: Contingency

Name: Home Building Compensation Fund
Description:
HBCF is an insurance policy that provides a safety net for home owners in NSW faced with incomplete and defective building work carried out by a builder or tradesperson, and is required on all jobs valued over $20,000. The cost is calculated on the total of construction costs.
NOTE - As this fee is calculated on total construction costs it may be necessary to be adjusted while calculating the final invoice on the project if the cost of the project increases.

Name: Project Management
Description: A job is only as good as the supervision it gets during construction. We pride ourselves on keeping up to date with all current industry rules and regulations, which we then make sure all our carpenters and contractors adhere to. All our projects, no matter how big or small all get constant supervision by our team, every single element is checked and passed by our stringent quality control measures.

Name: Construction Insurance
Description: Protects your project against unforeseen damage or delays due to events like storms or equipment failure, ensuring continuity and financial security

Name: Public Liability Insurance
Description: Covers any accidental injury or property damage to third parties on site, providing peace of mind for you and the community

Name: Work Cover
Description: This covers the mandatory workers’ compensation insurance required to ensure all on-site workers are protected in the event of injury. It’s a legal requirement and ensures compliance with workplace safety and insurance obligations throughout the project
